hero.tagline: MEN WHO TAKE CARE OF THEMSELVES LIVE MORE.

movement.subheading: THE GATHERING THAT UNITES PASSION, STYLE AND BROTHERHOOD
paragraphs: Gentlemen Blue is an annual event organized by Gentlemen Moto Club to raise awareness about prostate cancer and raise funds for healthcare institutions that work directly on prevention and treatment of the disease.
In its 5th edition, the event reinforces its commitment to men's health and solidarity, bringing together motorcycle enthusiasts, families and partners committed to making a difference.
movement.closing: MEN WHO TAKE CARE OF THEMSELVES LIVE MORE.

items.question: CAN I BRING MY FAMILY?
items.answer: Yes. Gentlemen Blue is a family-friendly event with attractions for different age groups.

items.question: HOW DOES PARKING WORK?
items.answer: On-site parking will be available subject to capacity. More details will be shared closer to the event date.

items.question: ARE PETS ALLOWED?
items.answer: Pets are not allowed, except for properly identified service dogs.

items.question: IS ALL REVENUE DONATED TO THE CAUSE?
items.answer: Yes. Gentlemen Blue is a charity event and fundraising supports prostate cancer awareness and prevention.

items.question: HOW CAN I BECOME A SPONSOR?
items.answer: Reach out through the Contact section or official channels to receive sponsorship and partnership information.

items.question: Do I need to buy a ticket?
items.answer: No. Entry is free and tickets are not sold. Just come on the day of the event.

items.question: DOES THE EVENT HAPPEN IN THE RAIN?
items.answer: Yes, the event takes place rain or shine unless weather conditions pose a safety risk.
